sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30282" key="e)gkiliki/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκῐλῐκ-ίζω</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">Κίλιξ</etym>) <sense id="n30282.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">play the Cilician to</tr_> one, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τινί</foreign>, i. e. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cheat</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0486.tlg001:166" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pherecr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">166</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
